This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Textarea wrapping transformation: wrapping round-trips: One\ntwo\nthreeintermingled\n\nlines\nand so
  assert_equals: Text expected to match expected "One\\ntwo\\nthreeintermingled\\n\\nlines\\nand so" but got "One\\ntwo\\nthreeinter\\nmingled\\n\\nlines\\nand so"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
